mapper.select: SELECT id, agent_id, role, message_type, content, tool_call_id, tool_name, tool_arguments, tool_call_status, create_time, thinking_content FROM chat_history WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} AND id > #{afterId} ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 50

SELECT id, agent_id, role, message_type, content, tool_call_id, tool_name, tool_arguments, tool_call_status, create_time, thinking_content FROM chat_history WHERE id > #{afterId} ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 50
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO chat_history (agent_id, role, message_type, content, tool_call_id, tool_name, tool_arguments, tool_call_status, create_time, thinking_content) VALUES (#{agentId}, #{role}, #{messageType}, #{content}, #{toolCallId}, #{toolName}, #{toolArguments}, #{toolCallStatus}, #{createTime}, #{thinkingContent})
SELECT last_insert_rowid()
